description: CompositionWhite round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, ribbed neckline with fabric tape detailing on the inseam, graphic print on the front with lettering and brand tab appliqued on the sideFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash in cool water at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry at low temperature or lay flat to dryWarm ironDo not iron on printThis white t-shirt from doodle is made specially for your adorable little boy. The graphic print on the front, with the text “Cheeky Monkey” seems so apt for him, that you will notice how much of a cheeky little monkey he really is! Team this cute tee with jeans or denim shorts and shower your love on the precious darling.
